$comment: Versioned with the butler plugin release (plugins/butler/CHANGELOG.md). Content unchanged since 0.2.0; $id corrected in 0.3.1. Personal chunks never reach the packer, so there is intentionally no `context` field here.
title: Butler packer input
description: One JSON object consumed by scripts/pack_schedule.py. Built by butler:plan / butler:reschedule from config + the target day's chunks + Calendar commitments.

now.description: ISO-8601 WITH offset. The target day's window start when planning a future day; the current time for reschedule. Placement never starts before this instant.

timezone.description: IANA timezone, e.g. Asia/Kolkata. Informational only; the offsets carried in the datetimes are authoritative.

fixed_commitments.description: Busy intervals (Calendar events + off-calendar duties) on the target day.

intensity.description: Freshness axis; drives packer ordering (deep first).

stage.$comment: SSOT for these stage keys is config.yaml `contexts.work.pipeline`; keep in sync (also mirrored in chunk-task.schema.json).
stage.description: Pipeline stage. Activity (build/verify/comms/admin) and the stage-order tiebreak are derived from this for clustering.

estimate_min.description: Focus-minutes for the target day (the fresh estimate after the AI discount). 0 or missing surfaces the chunk as overflow.

config.description: Omit to use the script defaults, which mirror the skill config.
